extracted_content: {"decomposed_queries":[{"question":"What are the Name of ICI and overall follow-up duration for trials where Cancer type is Melanoma and Name of ICI is Ipilimumab?","sql":"SELECT \"Name of ICI\", \"Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Overall\" FROM clinical_trials WHERE \"Cancer type\" = 'Melanoma' AND \"Name of ICI\" = 'Ipilimumab';"},{"question":"From ipilimumab melanoma trials, which have an overall follow-up duration greater than 21 months, list the Name of ICI and overall follow-up duration?","sql":"SELECT \"Name of ICI\", \"Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Overall\" FROM clinical_trials WHERE \"Cancer type\" = 'Melanoma' AND \"Name of ICI\" = 'Ipilimumab' AND \"Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Overall\" > 21;"}]}

extracted_content: {"decomposed_queries":[{"question":"What trials have Cancer type equal to Hepatocellular?","sql":"SELECT \"NCT\", \"Author\", \"Year\", \"Originial publication or Follow-up\", \"Lines of treatment\", \"Monotherapy/combination\", \"Cancer type\", \"Type of combination\", \"Trial phase\" FROM clinical_trials WHERE \"Cancer type\" = 'Hepatocellular';"},{"question":"What trials have Lines of treatment greater than or equal to 1?","sql":"SELECT \"NCT\", \"Author\", \"Year\", \"Originial publication or Follow-up\", \"Lines of treatment\", \"Monotherapy/combination\", \"Cancer type\", \"Type of combination\", \"Trial phase\" FROM clinical_trials WHERE \"Lines of treatment\" >= 1;"},{"question":"What trials use a combination treatment (Monotherapy/combination = 'Combination')?","sql":"SELECT \"NCT\", \"Author\", \"Year\", \"Originial publication or Follow-up\", \"Lines of treatment\", \"Monotherapy/combination\", \"Cancer type\", \"Type of combination\", \"Trial phase\" FROM clinical_trials WHERE \"Monotherapy/combination\" = 'Combination';"},{"question":"What trials satisfy all three conditions: cancer type Hepatocellular, Lines of treatment >= 1, and Monotherapy/combination = 'Combination'?","sql":"SELECT \"NCT\", \"Author\", \"Year\", \"Originial publication or Follow-up\", \"Lines of treatment\", \"Monotherapy/combination\", \"Cancer type\", \"Type of combination\", \"Trial phase\" FROM clinical_trials WHERE \"Cancer type\" = 'Hepatocellular' AND \"Lines of treatment\" >= 1 AND \"Monotherapy/combination\" = 'Combination';"}]}
